effect_cn: 每当你需要使用或打出一张【闪】时，你可以进行一次判定。
若判定结果为红色，视为你使用或打出了一张【闪】。
effect_en: Whenever you need to use or play a [Dodge], you may perform a Judgment.
If the result is Red (Hearts or Diamonds), it is treated as if you used or played a [Dodge].

faq.q_cn: 如果判定结果是黑色，我还能从手牌打出【闪】吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。如果判定失败，你仍然可以正常从手牌使用【闪】。
faq.q_en: If the Judgment is Black, can I still play a [Dodge] from my hand?
faq.a_en: Yes. If the judgment fails, you are still permitted to play a [Dodge] from your hand as normal.

faq.q_cn: 张角可以使用“鬼道”修改这个判定吗？
faq.a_cn: 可以。所有具备修改判定技能的武将都可以影响八卦阵的判定结果。
faq.q_en: Can Zhang Jiao use 'Guidao' to change this judgment?
faq.a_en: Yes. Any hero with a judgment-altering skill can change the result of Eight Trigrams.
